steps.title: Notice the contrast
steps.content: The sentence contrasts intensified information flow, which is linked to decisiveness, with the condition under which people choose more slowly. The missing word should mean that the flow is decreased.

steps.title: Choose the opposite of intensified
steps.content: B means assessed, C means judged or influenced, and D means obtained; none describes a lower rate of communication between brain regions. Reduced gives the needed contrast with intensified. The answer is A.
